about.title: About Gulel OTT
about.tagline: Vertical micro dramas, anywhere you go.
about.whatBody: Gulel OTT is a streaming platform built for the short-attention, always-on generation. We deliver bite-sized vertical dramas — think full emotional arcs packed into episodes you can finish in under 5 minutes. Romance, thriller, family drama, action: all shot vertically, built for your phone, and designed to keep you hooked.
about.contentBody: We produce and license original Hindi and Chinese micro drama series. Our library spans romance, supernatural, revenge, and slice-of-life genres. New series drop regularly. The first few episodes of every series are always free — unlock the rest with Gulel Coins.
about.how1: Browse and watch free episodes — no account needed to start.
about.how2: Sign in to save your progress and pick up where you left off.
about.how3: Purchase Gulel Coins to unlock premium episodes.
about.how4: Or watch a short ad to earn free coins.
about.contactBody: Questions, feedback, or partnership enquiries? We'd love to hear from you.

legal.authoritativeNotice: This translation is provided for your convenience. The English version is legally authoritative.
